title: Mormugão Fort
tagline: Mormugão Fort — heritage city of Goa

overview.short: The Mormugão fort was located on the southern tip of the mouth of the Zuari river in Mormugao in the state of Goa on the west coast of India.
overview.description: The Mormugão fort was located on the southern tip of the mouth of the Zuari river in Mormugao in the state of Goa on the west coast of India.

topPlaces.name: Operation Creek
topPlaces.description: Operation Creek, also known as Operation Longshanks, was a covert military operation undertaken by Britain's Special Operations Executive in World War II on 9 March 1943. It involved a nighttime attack by members of the Calcutta Light Horse and the Calcutta Scottish against a German cargo ship, Ehrenfels, which had been transmitting information to U-boats from Mormugão Harbour in neutral Portugal's territory of Goa.

topPlaces.name: Mormugao Port
topPlaces.description: Mormugao Port is a port on the western coast of India, in the coastal state of Goa. Commissioned in 1885 on the site of a natural harbour, it is one of India's oldest ports.

topPlaces.name: Tilak Maidan
topPlaces.description: Tilak Maidan is a multi-purpose stadium located in Vasco da Gama, Goa, India. It is used mostly for football matches and regularly hosts I-League and Goa Professional League matches.

topPlaces.name: Vasco da Gama, Goa
topPlaces.description: Vasco da Gama (, Portuguese: [ˈvaʃku ðɐ ˈɣɐmɐ]), often shortened to Vasco, is a city in the state of Goa on the west coast of India. It is named after the Portuguese explorer Vasco da Gama.

topPlaces.name: Caranzalem
topPlaces.description: Caranzalem (pronounced Caranzale) is a neighborhood located on the west side of the city of Panjim, the capital of the state of Goa. It is situated on the island of Tiswadi and is known for its beach with same name.

topPlaces.name: Railway Stadium, Vasco da Gama
topPlaces.description: Railway Stadium is a cricket ground in Vasco da Gama, Goa, India. The only recorded match held on the ground was a first-class match between Goa played Kerala in the 1986/87 Ranji Trophy, which Kerala won by 6 wickets.

topPlaces.name: International Centre, Goa
topPlaces.description: International Centre, Goa is a prominent conference centre, seminars venue, and cultural space in the western Indian state of Goa. It is located at Dona Paula, outside Panjim (Panjim).

topPlaces.name: Chicalim
topPlaces.description: Chicalim is a census town in Morumugão Sub-District, Goa, India. It is a suburb to the port city of Vasco da Gama.

items.note: Operation Creek, also known as Operation Longshanks, was a covert military operation undertaken by Britain's Special Operations Executive in World War II on 9 March 1943. It involved a nighttime attack by members of the Calcutta Light Horse and the Calcutta Scottish against a German cargo ship, Ehrenfels, which had been transmitting information to U-boats from Mormugão Harbour in neutral Portugal's territory of Goa.
Mormugao Port is a port on the western coast of India, in the coastal state of Goa. Commissioned in 1885 on the site of a natural harbour, it is one of India's oldest ports.
Tilak Maidan is a multi-purpose stadium located in Vasco da Gama, Goa, India. It is used mostly for football matches and regularly hosts I-League and Goa Professional League matches.

Caranzalem (pronounced Caranzale) is a neighborhood located on the west side of the city of Panjim, the capital of the state of Goa. It is situated on the island of Tiswadi and is known for its beach with same name.

Railway Stadium is a cricket ground in Vasco da Gama, Goa, India. The only recorded match held on the ground was a first-class match between Goa played Kerala in the 1986/87 Ranji Trophy, which Kerala won by 6 wickets.
International Centre, Goa is a prominent conference centre, seminars venue, and cultural space in the western Indian state of Goa. It is located at Dona Paula, outside Panjim (Panjim).
Chicalim is a census town in Morumugão Sub-District, Goa, India. It is a suburb to the port city of Vasco da Gama.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mormugão Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mormugão Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mormugão Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (5 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mormugão Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mormugão Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mormugão Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Mormugão Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mormugão Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Operation Creek, Mormugao Port, Tilak Maidan, Vasco da Gama, Goa, Caranzalem.
